> One line
> two lines > two lines
> three lines > three lines > three lines
> four lines > four lines > four lines

two lines

two lines

three lines

three lines

three lines

four lines

four lines

four lines

> two lines > two lines

> four lines > four lines > four lines

> Level 1 > > Level 2 > Back to Level 1 > > > Level 3
> Line 1 >> Line 2 >>> Line 3 > Line 4

Level 1

Level 2

Back to Level 1

Level 3

Line 1

Line 2

Line 3

Line 4

> Level 1 > > Level 2 > Back to Level 1 > > > Level 3
> Line 1 >> Line 2 >>> Line 3 > Line 4

> Something >>>[!note] Title >>> Body

Something

Title

Body

Something

Body

test

test

MdTestData.MdString:
>
This is a div inside a blockquote.

BlockQuoteMdSyntaxNode.HtmlMdSyntaxNode: This is a div inside a blockquote.

MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString: This is a div inside a blockquote.
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
>
This is a div inside a blockquote.

MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString: > Block Quote

MdTestData.MdString:
> Mixed levels and lists: > 1. First > > Nested blockquote with text. > 2. Second > - Sub-item > > Another nested quote.
> - First item > - Nested item with **bold text**. > - Second item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
Mixed levels and lists:

  1. First

    Nested blockquote with text.

  2. Second
    • Sub-item

      Another nested quote.

  • First item
    • Nested item with bold text.
  • Second item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
> Mixed levels and lists: > 1. First > > Nested blockquote with text. > 2. Second > - Sub-item > > Another nested quote.
> - First item > - Nested item with **bold text**. > - Second item

MdTestData.MdString:
> This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*.
> Inline formatting: > **Bold**, *italic*, `code`, and [link](https://example.com).
> **Bold text**, *italic text*, `inline code`, ~~strikethrough~~, and [link](https://example.com).
> This is a paragraph. > ``` > Code block inside a blockquote. > ```
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
This is a blockquote with bold text and italic text.

Inline formatting:

Bold, italic, code, and link.

Bold text, italic text, inline code, strikethrough, and link.

This is a paragraph.

Copy to clipboard
Code block inside a blockquote.
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
> This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*.
> Inline formatting: > **Bold**, *italic*, `code`, and [link](https://example.com).
> **Bold text**, *italic text*, `inline code`, ~~strikethrough~~, and [link](https://example.com).
> This is a paragraph. > ``` > Code block inside a blockquote. > ```

MdTestData.MdString: > This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*. > 1. First item > 2. Second item > - Sub-item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
This is a blockquote with bold text and italic text.

  1. First item
  2. Second item
    • Sub-item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown: > This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*. > 1. First item > 2. Second item > - Sub-item
